case_title: MARIA ESMERALDA CARTAGENA VS. ELSA BUITRAGO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARTAGENA, MARIA ESMERALDA AS TO DEFENDANT BUITRAGO, ELSA ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTAGENA, MARIA ESMERALDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUITRAGO, ELSA ,AN INDIVIDUAL $3,494.66 PRINCIPAL, $39.05 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,738.71, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
